titleStmt.title: SII 17.538: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 538. (A.R. No. 496 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Mithuna śu 13, Sunday, Kēṭṭai, correspond to 1234 A.D., June 11, Sunday, ·28; ·92.

This registers the agreement regarding a gift of 1/4 vēli of land in Anapāya-chatur vēdimaṅgalam in Iḍaiyaḷa-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to the donor Vēḷāṉ Kuḍandai Nāyakaṉ alias Pañchavarāyaṉ of Śiṟaikkāvūr, in Kiḻāy-kkūṟṟam, in Nittavinōdavaḷanāḍu by the temple authorities. The land was made over to the śivabrāhmaṇas for burning a perpetual lamp with one uḻakku of oil daily in the temple. The weight of the lamp is stated to be 80 palam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9 vatu mituṉa nāyaṟṟup pūrva pakṣattu tiraiyoteciyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa keṭṭai nāḷ Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyār koyil Atapati
kaṉmikaḷom nittaviṉotavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻāykkūṟṟattuc ciṟaikkāvūruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ kuṭantaināyakaṉāṉa pañcavarāyaṉukku nilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumuṉpu
nāḷmutal vaitta tirunuṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyāka Āṭṭaikku veṇṭum nellu muppatiṉ kalattukkum Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu
ḷakkat tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu Ivar tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟamākak koṇṭu viṭṭa rājentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyaḷa nāṭṭu Aṉapāyac caruppetimaṅkalattu tirunāmattukkā
ṇṭa nilattuc cilavāy kku vaṭakaraippaṭṭa nilattu Iṭaiyaḷa nāṭṭu veḷārkuṭiyāṉa maṉaicceyyil vaṭakkaṭaiyap payir nilam pa Innilaṅ kālukkum vilai niccayitta ka kkācu
kkoṇṭu Innilaṅkālum viṟṟukkuṭuttom pañcavarāyaṟku Āticaṇṭe cuvara tevarkaṉmikaḷom Innilaṅkāluṅ kaikkoṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟum cantirātittaval Aṭṭuvoma
muppatu vaṭṭattu kāṇiyuṭaiya civappirāmaṇarom Iva Iṭṭa tarāk kuttiviḷakku 1- ṉāl Iruppu naārācam Uṭpaṭa Eṭai 8 10- laThis symbol stands for ‘palam’. .
Digital edition of SII 17.538 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
